core_mechanism: minimum edit distance from a combinatorial object to a constrained target class, measured as the least number of elementary local modifications (element additions / edge deletions) needed to transform the object into a member of the class, together with comparability and extremal-bound analysis of such distance functionals
brief_reason: The abstract defines proximity measures as the minimum number of graph modifications (leaf addition, valid arc deletion, arc deletion) required to transform a network into one belonging to a particular class, and studies their pairwise comparability, complexity, and extremal bounds.
